news.title_en: Solana DeFi TVL Rises 12% This Week
news.summary_zh: DeFiLlama数据显示，Solana生态总锁仓量本周上涨12%，主要受新兴去中心化交易所交易量增长驱动。
news.summary_en: According to DeFiLlama, Solana's total value locked increased 12% this week, driven by rising trading volume on new decentralized exchanges.

news.title_en: Cardano Unveils Plutus V4 Upgrade Roadmap for 2026
news.summary_zh: IOG团队发布Plutus V4技术路线图，预计2026年Q3上线主网，将提升智能合约表达能力并降低手续费。
news.summary_en: IOG released the Plutus V4 technical roadmap, targeting mainnet launch in Q3 2026, with enhanced smart contract expressiveness and lower fees.

news.title_en: Chainlink CCIP Adds Support for 5 Major Blockchains
news.summary_zh: Chainlink跨链互操作协议CCIP新增支持Avalanche、Polygon zkEVM、Base、Arbitrum和Optimism五条主流公链。
news.summary_en: Chainlink’s Cross-Chain Interoperability Protocol (CCIP) now supports Avalanche, Polygon zkEVM, Base, Arbitrum, and Optimism, expanding cross-chain connectivity.

news.title_zh: 狗狗币计划引入ZK-Rollup扩容方案
news.title_en: Dogecoin Core Dev Proposes ZK-Rollup Layer 2 Scaling
news.summary_zh: Dogecoin基金会发布草案，拟采用ZK-Rollup Layer2技术降低小额转账手续费，提升网络效率。
news.summary_en: Dogecoin Foundation’s research group drafts a ZK-Rollup-based Layer 2 scaling proposal to reduce micro-transaction fees, aiming to improve network efficiency.
